# Daily Report — 2026-06-28

## Task Completed
Added `get_request_item` tool — retrieves a single requested item (sc_req_item / RITM record)
by RITM number (e.g. RITM0010001) or 32-character sys_id. Accepts both formats: number lookup
uses a sysparm_query GET against the sc_req_item table; sys_id lookup hits the record URL
directly. Returns a normalised item record via the existing `_format_request_item` helper with
reference fields (cat_item, request, assigned_to, assignment_group, opened_by) extracted as
display values. 404 and empty-result guards match existing get_* tool patterns.

Registered in `__init__.py`, `tool_utils.py`, and `tool_packages.yaml` (service_desk + full
packages), alongside `list_request_items` where it belongs as a companion tool.

## Test Results
- Total tests: 1886
- Coverage: 93%
- All passing: yes
- New tests added: 13 (TestGetRequestItem class in test_request_item_tools.py)

## Security
Pre-existing system dependency advisories (setuptools CVE-2024-6345, urllib3 PYSEC-2026-141/142,
wheel CVE-2026-24049) — not introduced by this change and not in project dependencies.

- `src/servicenow_mcp/utils/tool_utils.py` — import, param class, and tool dict entry
- `config/tool_packages.yaml` — added to service_desk and full packages
- `tests/test_request_item_tools.py` — 13 new tests covering success/404/empty/HTTP-error paths

## Next Up
